FORBIDDEN ARCANA
HELLFIRE (15 MP)
Chaos fire + BURNING.

RESTORATION (25 MP)
Mend wounds and purge toxins.

VOID SHIELD (40 MP)
Entropy field to negate 4 hits.

SOUL RAGE (30 MP)
Massive strike + STUN.

VOID GRASP (20 MP)
Pull + WEAKEN + WET.

FORCE BLAST (20 MP)
Push enemy & STUN.

ARCANE SHOCK (30 MP)
Chain lightning. AOE on WET.

THE VOID FORGE
ELIXIR (2x HP Pot)
Complete vital restoration.

UPGRADE WPN (3x Iron)
Increase Strike Power (+6).

UPGRADE ARM (3x Iron)
Increase Deflection (+6).

SOUL REAP (5x Dust)
Channel dust for massive XP.

BESTIARY OF THE VOID
DISCOVERED CHRONICLES
WANDERING SOUL
"I seek release... will you offer your harvest for my whispers?"
RITE ALTARS (SAVES)
SURVIVAL SCROLL
[ NAVIGATION & COMBAT ]
- WASD / ARROWS: Move and Rotate. Rotating just as an enemy strikes triggers a PARRY, followed by a deadly COUNTER-STRIKE.
- SPACE / E: Attack / Interact / Break Walls. Striking an unaware enemy deals 2.5x VOID STRIKE damage.
- R: REST. Costs 10 NRG to recover massive VIT. Requires safety from nearby monsters.
- ESC: Close all menus and scrolls.

[ SURVIVAL SYSTEMS ]
- POUCH: Use potions for VIT/NRG, or throw bombs/oils to exploit enemy weaknesses.
- FORGE: Spend Iron Scraps to upgrade gear. Weapons gain STR, Armor gains DEF. Higher MK levels grant unique names.
- TOME: Unleash Spells. Synergy matters: use VOID GRASP to make enemies WET, then ARCANE SHOCK for massive AOE damage.
- RITES (SAVES): Perform a rite at Altar slots to preserve your soul. You can load from any previous Altar.

[ THE STRATA ]
- BIOMES: The Crypt (1-4), Frozen Wastes (5-8), and Magma Core (9-12). Each has unique hazards like moving Ice Blocks or Lava Veins.
- SECRETS: Some walls are cracked. Break them to find hidden riches or path-skipping hatches.
- WANDERING SOULS: Complete multi-stage narrative quests for permanent stat bonuses. Choices at completion define your legacy.
- PORTALS: Magical gateways connecting the Crypt to other realms. The Vibe Jam Portal leads to the Webring.

HARVEST SOULS. DESCEND 12 LEVELS. KILL THE SOVEREIGN.
THUD!
DESCENDING DEEPER...
CONSTRUCTING REALITY...
